messages.content: These risk write-ups share funnel target nodes, which does NOT make them the same risk — a funnel is coarse, so mechanistically distinct risks (a certification clock, a grid-connection queue, a distributor line-review cycle) can all compile to the same node. PARTITION the cluster into groups of TRUE duplicates: same underlying mechanism, same causal story, such that presenting both to a client would read as repetition. Distinct risks come back as singleton groups (absorbs: []). For a genuine duplicate group, pick the best exemplar (sharpest mechanism, best evidence) as keepId and fold the absorbed write-ups' UNIQUE early-warning indicators into it. Over-merging destroys distinct insights — when in doubt, keep them separate.

content: {"rationale":"Two write-ups (mid-eichrecht-billing-metering-forecloses-german-colo and mid-eichrecht-metering-foreclosure) describe the identical mechanism: MID/MessEG legal-metrology certification forecloses billing-grade PDU metering in Germany. They are true duplicates. The remaining three describe mechanistically distinct risks even though they share the serviceableFactor node: a temporal reachability/certification-clock argument (prelet-lockin), a DCIM/vendor spec-lock concentration argument (intelligent-pdu-concentration), and an EnEfG/EED reporting-driven DCIM-integration gate (enefg-eed-reporting). Each has a different causal story and stays a singleton.","groups":[{"keepId":"risk.execution-window.mid-eichrecht-metering-foreclosure","absorbs":["risk.regulatory-gauntlet.mid-eichrecht-billing-metering-forecloses-german-colo"],"foldedIndicators":[{"signal":"MID/Eichrecht metering clauses in German colo fit-out and PDU procurement specs","where":"German colo operator RFQs (NTT GDC, maincubes, Telehouse Frankfurt vendor portals); DKE/PTB legal-metrology dockets on data-center sub-metering","threshold":"MID-compliant outlet metering named as mandatory in ≥2 German colo PDU specs","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"Incumbents marketing MID-certified PDU meter modules as a line item","where":"Rittal/Bachmann/Schleifenbauer price lists and German product pages (MID variants carry distinct SKUs)","threshold":"MID variants appearing as the default rather than premium option in German channel price lists","updates":"increases"}]},{"keepId":"risk.base-rate-analogy.prelet-lockin-serviceable-window","absorbs":[],"foldedIndicators":[]},{"keepId":"risk.competitive-foreclosure.intelligent-pdu-concentration-shrinks-serviceable","absorbs":[],"foldedIndicators":[]},{"keepId":"risk.regulatory-gauntlet.enefg-eed-reporting-spec-creep-dcim-lock","absorbs":[],"foldedIndicators":[]}]}
